name: mini-dify
description: Mini version of Dify - visual LLM workflow builder

scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:backend && pnpm build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @mini-dify/shared type-check && pnpm --filter @mini-dify/backend type-check && pnpm --filter @mini-dify/frontend type-check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mini-dify/backend exec node --require ts-node/register --test "src/**/*.spec.ts" && pnpm --filter @mini-dify/backend exec node --import tsx --test "../frontend/src/**/*.spec.ts" "../frontend/src/**/*.spec.tsx"
